name: Pot O' Gold
description: Pot O' Gold is a rare Bandit shield in Borderlands 2. When you are hit, it can occasionally spawn small cash boosters that are picked up instantly. It can help offset regular ammo spending, but its protection is often outclassed by other rare shields of the same level.
notes: At higher levels, the money gained is usually too small to matter. Cash generated by its booster effect does not count towards the Dolla Dolla Bills Y'all challenge. Despite functioning like a blue booster shield, it uses the look of a purple maylay shield.

special.description: When taking damage, it may generate a small cash pickup (often under 10 dollars) that is collected immediately. Collecting it does not restore shield capacity.
special.title: Blarney, I say! 'Tis blarney!
